title: Color Expansion
description: Adds variants colors of minecraft blocks!
body:
Color Expansion Mod

The Color Expansion Mod adds a variety of new block colors to Minecraft, including Green Bricks, Blue Bricks, Yellow Bricks, and more. Enhance your builds with vibrant and diverse colors, allowing for greater creativity and customization in your world. Simple crafting recipes make it easy to create these new blocks. Compatible with the latest Minecraft versions. 



Recipes!



![Recipe for Red Bricks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c65ac3a11d98b6e9a9f07c4891a49310a292055d.png)![Recipe for Black Stone Bricks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/025dc35f24aa1defb210bac0e7b50d917a6a7c09.png)
